segments.text:
elongation – the peptidyltransferase reaction
no proof-reading

charged tRNA enters A site complexed with Elongation Factor + GTP
EF-1 in eukaryotes
EF-Tu in prokaryotes
delays peptidyltransferase reaction – check base-pairing

GTP hydrolysis by EF-1
exposes amino group
releases energy

stay on 5’ cap as pre-initiation
complex moves down mRNA
initiation factors bind 7mG cap
recruits next small ribosomal subunit/pre-initiation complex

Polycistronic mRNA
multiple independent coding sequences, one mRNA

ribosome
binding
site
met
arg
overlapping genes/coding sequences
very constrained

Protein processing – proteolytic cleavage
translation product =
precursor protein
5 signaling peptides/hormones
Polio virus “polyprotein” = all proteins needed for progeny virus

Protein processing - glycosylation
N-linked
to Asn side chains
in rER
O-linked
to Ser, Thr side chains
in Golgi
